packageRules.description: Agent CLIs baked into ShipIt session-worker/orchestrator images (docs/141-cli-version-strategy). Hold every new version for the 7-day supply-chain cooldown, group all three into a single PR, and keep the bump as exact pins so docker/agent-cli/package-lock.json is regenerated with fresh integrity hashes. Auto-merge stays OFF until the Axis-3 CLI contract test is wired as a required status check — until then a human reviews + merges the bump PR.
